sections.title: Transponder
text: To record the lap times made on the track we are using the LapMonitor system.
The LapMonitor system consists of a decoder that reads the beam of the transponder that is installed on your car.
The transponder should be placed so the beam is facing out of the righthand side of the car.

sections.title: Track Layout
sections.text: The track being used for the club leaderboard is shown here.

sections.title: LapMonitor Setting
text: The lap times need to be submitted to Ben via WhatsApp.
Change the Race export format to JSON, this can be done by going in to the settings.
Once the export format has been changed, just share the session with Ben and the times will be uploaded.

sections.title: Transponder Id
text: Each driver has a Transponder Id, this unique number identifies your vehicle.
Let Ben know your Transponder Id and Car build via WhatsApp if you want to take part in the leaderboard challenge.
